title: Geepas 1200W Powerful Hair Dryer | 2-Speed & 2 Temperature Setting | Mini Compact Hair Dryer for Frizz Free Shine & Elegant Concentrator | Portable – 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ POWERFUL HAIRDRYER - A powerful hairdryer with the drying performance of a 1200W means your hair dries fast with less heat – helping you protect your hair and gives you a controlled & concentrated style that remains still day & night.

✅ 2 SPEED AND 2 TEMPERATURE SETTINGS - Whatever your hair type, whatever your style, there’s a 2 heat setting and 2 speed settings that’s just right for you to help you achieve a perfect result for finishing and setting your style.
✅ ELEGANT CONCENTRATOR- Concentrator nozzle directs airflow to reduce fly away hairs and create a smooth finish.
✅ 2-YEAR WARRANTY - It has compact design, giving you quick drying results with every use. Comes with 2 Year Manufacturer Warranty.

✅ GIFT CHOICE – Geepas Compact Hair Dryer is an ideal gift to send to your familes, friends, relatives or classmates, girl friend, daughter, or mothers on Festival days like Thanksgiving day, Christmas Day, etc.
description: Product Description 2 SPEED SETTINGS Whatever your hair type or style, 2 heat & 2 speed settings help you finish & set your look perfectly. ELEGANT CONCENTRATOR Concentrator nozzle directs airflow to reduce fly away hairs and create a smooth finish. POWERFUL AIRFLOW This hair dryer delivers powerful airflow, high-shine finish, and total control of your drying routine. FRIZZ FREE HAIRS For easy styling and smooth heat, use the salon concentrator nozzle for faster, frizz-free results.
